question: Chapters
feedback: Text lists three main sections of the thesis: 1. Tēmas aktualitātes pamatojums un/vai pētījuma motivācija, 2. Noslēguma darba mērķis un tā sasniegšanai izvirzītie uzdevumi, 3. Īss katras noslēguma darba nodaļas un pielikumu satura apraksts. These correspond to standard thesis introduction components.

question: Description
feedback: The text mentions the general content of each section but does not provide any meaningful description of what each section will contain. For example, it only states 'īss satura apraksts' without specifying what will be covered in each chapter or appendix.

question: Structure
feedback: While the general structure is partially visible (three main parts), the lack of descriptive content makes it difficult to fully understand the flow and organization of the thesis. The reader cannot infer how the sections relate to each other or what the overall progression of the work will be.
